description: PRD-27: Design consistency pass — adopt tokens, add transitions, fix dark mode gaps

userStories.title: Adopt INPUT_BASE token in FeedbackWidget form fields
userStories.description: FeedbackWidget.jsx FeedbackFormFields (lines 112-129) has three form inputs (select, textarea, email input) with hardcoded Tailwind classes like 'w-full rounded-button border border-gray-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 text-sm...'. The INPUT_BASE token already covers these styles. Replace the inline classes on all three form fields with INPUT_BASE. INPUT_BASE is already imported in the file (search for existing imports). Keep any custom overrides (rows, maxLength, placeholder) as separate props.

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to CalendarEventsList buttons and fix dark mode
userStories.description: CalendarEventsList.jsx has two buttons missing transitions: (1) Add Event button (line ~25) — add transition-colors. (2) Delete event button (line ~51) — add transition-colors and dark mode: 'dark:hover:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-gray-500'. Also fix delete button text-gray-300 to text-gray-400 (300 is too faint).
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button has transition-colors and dark mode variants
Delete button uses text-gray-400 instead of text-gray-300

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to EmailVerificationBanner interactive elements
userStories.description: EmailVerificationBanner.jsx has two interactive elements missing transition-colors: (1) Resend email link button (line ~64), (2) Dismiss X button (line ~74). Add transition-colors to both. Also add dark:hover:text-amber-200 support to the dismiss button (currently no dark hover).
acceptanceCriteria: Dismiss button has dark hover variant

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to SharePipeline CopyButton and RevokeButton
userStories.description: SharePipeline.jsx CopyButton (line ~42) and Revoke button (line ~66) have hover states but no transition-colors. Add transition-colors to both. Also standardize focus:ring-offset-1 to focus:ring-offset-2 on both buttons (matching the standardized offset from PRD-26).

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to ApplicationListHeader sort buttons
userStories.description: ApplicationListHeader.jsx ColumnHeader buttons (line ~8) have hover:text-gray-900 but no transition-colors. Add transition-colors to the ColumnHeader button className. Also fix focus:ring-offset-1 → focus:ring-offset-2 for consistency.

userStories.title: Standardize remaining focus:ring-offset-1 to focus:ring-offset-2 app-wide
userStories.description: Audit all components for focus:ring-offset-1 (the old value) and change to focus:ring-offset-2 (the standard). PRD-26 fixed DetailPanelHeader. Remaining instances may be in CalendarEventsList, SharePipeline, and ApplicationListHeader. Use grep to find all instances. Do NOT change focus:ring-offset-0 — those are intentional.
acceptanceCriteria: No focus:ring-offset-1 remains in any component (except intentional overrides)

userStories.title: Create ICON_BUTTON token for icon-only buttons and adopt in NavBar and DetailPanelHeader
userStories.description: Multiple components have icon-only buttons with duplicated styles. Create an ICON_BUTTON token in designTokens.js: 'rounded-full p-1.5 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-700 transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-2 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 dark:hover:text-gray-200'. Adopt in: (1) DetailPanelHeader close button, (2) NavBar theme toggle icon buttons. Do NOT adopt everywhere at once — just these two highest-visibility spots.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar icon buttons use ICON_BUTTON where appropriate

userStories.title: Add font-display to section headings in SharePipeline and CalendarEventsList
userStories.description: Poppins (font-display) is used for headings across the app, but SharePipeline h2 (line ~111) and CalendarEventsList legend text (line ~21) use the default sans font. Add font-display to these headings for consistency with the rest of the app's heading hierarchy.
